chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 1070 of 2025 PRESENT: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, Mr. Justice Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Petitioner: Azeem Daud Masih, through Mr. Ali Raza Pathan Advocate. Respondents: Province of Sindh & others, through Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Asst. Advocate General Sindh. Date of Hearing: 11.03.2026. Date of Decision: 11.03.2026. O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J.- The petitioner seeks appointment in Government service on the deceased quota under the erstwhile Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974. That rule was struck down by the Supreme Court of Pakistan in the case of General Post Office, Islamabad v. Muhammad Jalal (PLD 2024 SC 1276). Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that said judgment applies prospectively. But, even if that is so, the civil servant in this case had passed away on 02.11.2024 i.e. after the aforesaid judgment of the Supreme Court which was delivered on 26.09.2024. Therefore, this petition is hit by the GPO case (supra) and not maintainable. The petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Qazi Tahir PA/*
